creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm sorry, I cannot reproduce this and this is the only report about
this, so you may need to dig into this yourself looking into actual
instances of configure.log or include files being used.

That said, should this be related to older instances of head files
being cached by GCC after preprocessing (fixincl/fix-includes), I
made changes to avoid those around July, so after you reported this,
in case it does make a difference, so actually this may be fixed or
"fixed"!
